Properties.Description:
This rare ring was part of the special edition Easter 2025 Classified Strongboxes. This device employs powerful neuroconductive technology to improve a variety of combat capabilities

Equip Slot: Left Hand

IMPORTANT NOTE: This item currently does not deteriorate while equipped, but may have deterioration implemented in a future version update.

This ring adds "Cellular Mayhem" debuff.

A powerful limited version of the Ares ring with the drawback of slowly weakening you. While equipped, increases incoming damage dealt to you by 1% every 120 seconds, this effect stacks. The ring will need to be unequipped to recover from this effect.
This special edition Omegaton garment is exclusive to the Mayhem Cosmetic Token Trader.
This Item was handed out as a Christmas gift during the 2011 holiday season.

Values.Description: You are immune against the effects of swamp gas
